description: The Classic 350 is Royal Enfield's nostalgia machine. The retro design, the thump, the presence — it is a statement. Built on the modern J-series engine, it fixes the old vibration issues while keeping the character that made it an icon. This is not a motorcycle, it is an emotion.
pros: Iconic design that never gets old
New J-series engine is smooth and refined
Build quality that feels built to last
cons: Vibrations still creep in at highway speeds
Basic instrument cluster on base variants
Ground clearance is tight for speed bumps
Tyres feel narrow for the bike's weight

common_problems.problem: Rust on exhaust and chrome parts
common_problems.cause: Classic design has more exposed metal, Indian humidity accelerates rust
common_problems.solution: Apply anti-rust treatment regularly. Cover the bike when parked outdoors.

common_problems.problem: Seat discomfort on rides over 100 km
common_problems.cause: Stock seat padding is firm by design for the retro look
common_problems.solution: Aftermarket gel seat or air-cushion cover makes a big difference.

common_problems.cause: Single-cylinder engine characteristics, even with J-series refinement
common_problems.solution: Normal for this engine type. Keep RPM below 4,000 for comfortable cruising.

buying_advice.oem_vs_aftermarket: OEM accessories fit perfectly but cost more. For the Classic 350, aftermarket offers good value for non-critical items like phone mounts and bike covers. For crash protection, go OEM or from a trusted brand.
money_saving_tips: Buy during festive season sales (Diwali, Republic Day) for 15-30% discounts
Start with essentials, add accessories as you identify actual needs
Check Amazon, Flipkart, and local dealers — prices vary significantly
Invest in quality riding gear — it protects you across every ride
common_mistakes: Buying a cheap helmet to save money
Skipping crash guard — one tip-over can cost thousands in repairs
Using WD-40 as chain lube — it is a cleaner, not a lubricant
Not reading the owner's manual for service intervals
